title: Unstable State│不穩定狀態
description: Creepers are more likely to explode.│苦力怕更容易爆炸。
body:
# Function│功能
There is a 10% chance that a creeper will explode when it dies, if killed by fire or explosion damage or if on fire when dying, there is a 100% chance of explode.│苦力怕死亡有10%概率產生一次爆炸，如果被火焰及爆炸類傷害擊殺或者在死亡時處在著火的狀態則必定爆炸。
